LanguageData.Ammo_20x82mmMauser_AP.label: 20x82mm Mauser (AP)
LanguageData.Ammo_20x82mmMauser_AP.description: Large caliber cartridge used by autocannons and a handful of anti-tank rifles.
LanguageData.Ammo_20x82mmMauser_Incendiary.label: 20x82mm Mauser (AP-I)
LanguageData.Ammo_20x82mmMauser_Incendiary.descriptio: Large caliber cartridge used by autocannons and a handful of anti-tank rifles.
LanguageData.Ammo_20x82mmMauser_HE.label: 20x82mm Mauser (AP-HE)
LanguageData.Ammo_20x82mmMauser_HE.description: Large caliber cartridge used by autocannons and a handful of anti-tank rifles.
LanguageData.Ammo_20x82mmMauser_Sabot.label: 20x82mm Mauser (Sabot)
LanguageData.Ammo_20x82mmMauser_Sabot.description: Large caliber cartridge used by autocannons and a handful of anti-tank rifles.
LanguageData.Bullet_20x82mmMauser_AP.label: 20mm Mauser bullet (AP)
LanguageData.Bullet_20x82mmMauser_Incendiary.label: 20mm Mauser bullet (AP-I)
LanguageData.Bullet_20x82mmMauser_HE.label: 20mm Mauser bullet (AP-HE)
